debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst : DecidableEq α
inst_1 : SampleableType α
inst✝ : OracleSpec.DecidableEq (MerkleTree.spec α)
preexisting_cache : QueryCache (MerkleTree.spec α)
n : ℕ
leaves : List.Vector α (2 ^ (n + 1))
⊢ HasEvalSPMF.NeverFail
    (((simulateQ randomOracle).toFun (List.Vector α (2 ^ n))
          (Vector.mmap (fun x => liftM (query (x.1, x.2)))
            (List.Vector.ofFn fun i =>
              (leaves.get ⟨2 * ↑i, MerkleTree.buildLayer._proof_4 n i⟩,
                leaves.get ⟨2 * ↑i + 1, MerkleTree.buildLayer._proof_5 n i⟩)))).run
      preexisting_cache)

failed_attempts:
case h_cons x xs ih =>
      simp [Vector.mmap]
      apply HasEvalSPMF.neverFail_bind_run
      · infer_instance
      · intro _; apply HasEvalSPMF.neverFail_bind_run; · exact ih; · intro _; infer_instance

apply neverFail_simulate
  intros i t s
  cases i
  simp [randomOracle]
  split <;> simp [HasEvalSPMF.neverFail_pure, HasEvalSPMF.neverFail_sample]

· simp [Vector.mmap, simulateQ, randomOracle]
  · simp [Vector.mmap, simulateQ, randomOracle, HasEvalSPMF.neverFail_bind_iff, *]
    intros; infer_instance

generalize (List.Vector.ofFn fun i => (leaves.get ⟨2 * i, by omega⟩,
    leaves.get ⟨2 * i + 1, by omega⟩)) = pairs
  induction pairs using Vector.inductionOn generalizing preexisting_cache
  · simp [Vector.mmap, simulateQ, randomOracle]
  · simp [Vector.mmap, simulateQ, randomOracle]
    apply HasEvalSPMF.neverFail_bind
    · simp [simulateQ, randomOracle, apply_sim_oracle, queryCachingOracle, statelessOracle]
      apply HasEvalSPMF.neverFail_sample
    · intro; apply ih

case cons x v ih =>
    simp [Vector.mmap, simulateQ_bind, simulateQ_query, randomOracle_apply, NeverFail_bind_iff,
      neverFail_run_query_randomOracle]
    intro; intro; apply ih

| h_nil => simp [Vector.mmap, simulateQ, randomOracle]
  | h_cons x xs ih =>
    simp [Vector.mmap, simulateQ, randomOracle]
    apply HasEvalSPMF.neverFail_bind
    · simp [randomOracle]
    · intro; apply ih

<;> simp [Vector.mmap, simulateQ_bind, simulateQ_query, randomOracle, cachingOracle,
    HasEvalSPMF.neverFail_bind_iff, HasEvalSPMF.neverFail_pure_iff,
    HasEvalSPMF.neverFail_query_iff, *]

· simp [Vector.mmap, simulateQ]; infer_instance
  · intro x xs ih; simp [Vector.mmap, simulateQ]; infer_instance

generalize List.Vector.ofFn (fun i => (leaves.get ⟨2 * i, _⟩, leaves.get ⟨2 * i + 1, _⟩)) = pairs
  induction pairs using Vector.inductionOn generalizing preexisting_cache
  case nil => simp [Vector.mmap, HasEvalSPMF.neverFail_run_pure]
  case cons head tail ih =>
    simp [Vector.mmap, HasEvalSPMF.neverFail_run_bind, ih, neverFail_randomOracle]

· simp [Vector.mmap, simulateQ, OracleComp.run, HasEvalSPMF.NeverFail_pure]
  · simp [Vector.mmap, simulateQ, OracleComp.run, HasEvalSPMF.NeverFail_bind, *]
    apply randomOracle.neverFail

· simp [Vector.mmap, OracleSim.run_pure, HasEvalSPMF.neverFail_pure]
  · simp [Vector.mmap, OracleSim.run_bind, HasEvalSPMF.neverFail_bind_iff, simulateQ,
      randomOracle, cachingOracle, OracleSim.run_query, HasEvalSPMF.neverFail_sample, *]
    split <;> simp [HasEvalSPMF.neverFail_pure]
